inputReview.fileName: Muththaiththaru Pathi Thirunagai Unresolved Evidence Research.docx

acceptedFindings.claim: Muththaiththaru is indexed as sequence 6 in the current production source and Sivaya digital index.
acceptedFindings.productionAction: Keep internal ID 0006 and source-specific number 6.

acceptedFindings.claim: The Chandam opening is தத்தத்தன தத்தத் தனதன.
A 1964 Arunagirinathar film soundtrack contains a track titled Muthaitharu performed by T. M. Soundararajan with music credited to T. R. Papa.
acceptedFindings.productionAction: Metadata and official external link may be recorded; do not host or copy the recording.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: Arunagirinathar is definitively dated to 1430–1450 through Deva Raya II evidence.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: Institut Français de Pondichéry notes that the dating problem is difficult, Praudhadevaraya may refer to multiple rulers, and the synchronism depends partly on legendary material.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: The Arunachala Puranam is the earliest authoritative source that explicitly corroborates the modern rescue narrative.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: Institut Français de Pondichéry distinguishes later hagiographic versions from sixteenth-century temple puranas and states that the latter do not substantially corroborate the modern detailed legend.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: The 1895 and 1901 editions, page numbers, library identifiers and archive.org URLs supplied in the report are verified.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: The named archive identifiers and URLs could not be independently located, and no scan or institutional catalogue record was supplied.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: Tolkappiyam directly proves the exact heavy/light mapping asserted for this song.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: A general prosody framework is not sufficient evidence for the song-specific scansion without a cited page-level specialist analysis.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: Hamsadhvani and Bouli are established standard arrangements with the named performers and rights holders.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: No authoritative recording, album, catalogue or rights-holder evidence was supplied for these specific arrangements.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: The 1964 film arrangement is verified as Shanmukhapriya.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: Official Saregama metadata verifies the track, singer, album and music director but does not state the raga.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: The underlying literary text and early editions are indisputably public domain worldwide.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: Rights must be assessed by jurisdiction and layer. Modern editions, transcriptions, translations, arrangements, performances, recordings and scans may have separate rights.

claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.claim: The 1964 sound recording automatically entered the public domain in India on 1 January 2025 and may therefore be reused.
claimsRejectedOrDowngraded.reason: Even where a statutory term calculation is relevant, chain of title, publication facts, amendments, neighbouring rights, contractual rights, platform territories and current rights-holder claims require legal review. Saregama continues to present and license the track.

strongerSources: Institut Français de Pondichéry scholarly study
Saregama official track and album catalogue
insufficientAsFinalAuthority: personal blogs without page-level primary evidence

metadataAllowedNow: Record the existence of the 1964 Saregama soundtrack track as metadata only.
metadataBlocked: Exact first-print dates without scans or catalogue records
Detailed rescue narrative as proven history
Hosting or copying third-party sound recordings

nextResearchPriorities: Locate institutional scans or catalogue records for the claimed 1894, 1895 and 1901 editions.
Find a page-level scholarly treatment of Arunagirinathar chronology and the Praudhadevaraya references.
Trace the earliest textual witness for the detailed Tiruvannamalai rescue narrative.
Verify each claimed raga through an identifiable recording or notation publication.
Obtain legal or rights-holder review before any reuse of the 1964 recording or melody.
